name: Cheese Brioche 2
recipeIngredient: 1. 2 cups all-purpose flour (see "Cheese Brioche 1" for inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake in a 375°F oven for 30-35 minutes until light golden brown and puffy. Let cool for 10 minutes.
2. Remove from pan.
3. Slice into 1-2 inch slices.
4. Serve hot or at room temperature on a wooden cutting board.
5. Yields 16 slices.
